other_observers: Jim Schmoker and unknown person; First found on 1 December by Nick Komar.
specific_location: Chatfield Reservoir below Heron Overlook platform
description: A dark-backed and dark-headed goose. Bill dark, neck with white necklace that does NOT meet in the front or in the back. Breast dark gray like face color, contrasting strongly with light tan (with some darker brown feathers) breast and contrasting with white udertail. Upper tail coverts white. Rear of tan belly with darker brown feathers forming horizontal bars. Back browish.Behaviors: Feeding on shore where cattail marsh emptied into Chatfield Reservoir. Seemed to select taller dried grasses. Also seen floating just offshore with Canada Geese. Also seen in flight when the two Brant flew south right past where I was standing.Call: none heardPlumage: adult
photographer: Photographer: bill maynard, bill maynard, bill maynard
